# Aureum

> Security Baseline Suite for AI-powered control generation and compliance management

## Overview

Aureum is a local-first Security Baseline Suite that uses AI to analyze technical documentation, vendor guides, and security standards to generate comprehensive security controls. It maps controls to compliance frameworks like NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, and CIS Controls with full traceability.

## Target Users

- Security Engineers — Automate creation of security baselines from vendor documentation
- Compliance Officers — Map controls to regulatory frameworks with full traceability
- CISOs & Security Managers — Visibility into security posture via dashboards and reports
- GRC Teams — Streamline governance, risk, and compliance workflows

## Core Features

### Project Management
- Create projects tied to specific technologies and vendors
- Organize projects with tags, categories, and team assignments
- Track project status and progress through the Dashboard

### Source Library
- Upload technical documents (PDF, DOCX, TXT) as security sources
- Import content from URLs with automatic parsing
- Tag and organize sources with confidence scoring
- AI-powered content extraction and analysis

### AI-Powered Control Generation
- Analyze sources using AI (supports multiple LLM providers)
- Generate security controls with STRIDE threat categorization
- Each control includes: description, criticality, threat scenarios, automation guidance
- Confidence scoring based on source quality and AI analysis

### Baseline Editor
- Review, edit, and approve generated security controls
- Filter by category (STRIDE), criticality, review status
- Interactive Mind Map visualization of control relationships
- Side-by-side comparison between baseline versions
- Version history with diff viewing and rollback capability

### Traceability Matrix
- Map controls to compliance frameworks: NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, CIS Controls v8, MITRE ATT&CK
- Radar chart visualization of framework coverage
- Filter and search across framework mappings
- Export traceability reports (CSV, JSON, PDF)

### AI Assistant
- Context-aware assistant available on every page
- Answers questions about the platform and security best practices
- Provides contextual suggestions based on current page
- Supports multiple languages (English, Portuguese, Spanish)

### Export & Import
- Export baselines in multiple formats (CSV, JSON, PDF, Markdown)
- Import existing baselines and controls
- Version-controlled exports with metadata

### Team Collaboration
- Create and manage teams
- Assign projects to teams
- Role-based access (owner, admin, member)
- Notification system for team activities

### Settings & Configuration
- AI provider configuration in Settings > AI Integrations:
  - Provider tab: New/Edit/Delete provider and provider-scoped credentials when applicable
  - Model tab: New/Edit/Delete model and model-scoped credentials/endpoints when applicable
  - Integration tab: choose primary/fallback model only, then use Save Selection or Save and Test
- Theme customization (light/dark mode)
- Language selection (EN, PT-BR, ES)
- User profile management

## Routes

- `/auth` — Login and registration page
- `/` — Dashboard with project overview and statistics
- `/new-project` — Create a new security baseline project
- `/sources` — Source Library for managing documentation
- `/rules` — Rules and templates management
- `/workspace` — AI Workspace for control generation
- `/editor` — Baseline Editor with mind map visualization
- `/traceability` — Traceability Matrix for compliance mapping
- `/history` — Version history and baseline snapshots
- `/export-import` — Export and import baselines
- `/ai-integrations` — AI provider configuration
- `/teams` — Team management
- `/docs` — Platform documentation
- `/settings` — User and application settings

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- UI Components: shadcn/ui (Radix primitives)
- State Management: TanStack React Query
- Backend: Local API + SQLite (`local-api/server.mjs`)
- AI: Multi-provider configuration (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic Claude, Grok/xAI, Ollama local models)
- Charts: Recharts
- Routing: React Router v6

## Data Model

### Projects
Core entity representing a security baseline project. Contains name, technology, vendor, status, tags, and team assignment.

### Controls
Security controls generated by AI analysis. Each control has: control_id, title, description, category (STRIDE), criticality, confidence_score, framework_mappings, threat_scenarios, automation guidance, and review_status.

### Sources
Documentation sources uploaded or imported for AI analysis. Includes file metadata, extracted content, confidence scoring, and tags.

### Baseline Versions
Snapshots of control sets at specific points in time. Enables version comparison, diff viewing, and rollback.

### Teams & Members
Team collaboration with role-based access control.

### Notifications
Activity notifications for team events, control reviews, and project updates.

### AI Provider Configs
Configuration for multiple AI providers with:
- provider/model registry CRUD
- provider-scoped and model-scoped credentials
- primary/fallback model selection per provider
- explicit save and test actions in Integration

## API (Edge Functions)

- `generate-controls` — AI analysis of sources to generate security controls
- `parse-document` — Extract text content from uploaded documents
- `parse-url` — Fetch and parse content from URLs
- `doc-assistant` — Context-aware AI assistant for documentation help
- `restore-baseline` — Restore a previous baseline version

## Security

- Row-Level Security (RLS) on all database tables
- Authentication required for all application routes
- Team-based access control for projects and resources
- Encrypted API key storage for AI providers
